headline: Howmet Aerospace Weighed As Core Defense Holding Despite Rich Valuation
summary: Howmet Aerospace (NYSE:HWM) is being framed as a top defense stock as global security risks rise. Closure of the Strait of Hormuz and attacks on energy infrastructure have pushed defense and aerospace names back into focus. Commentators are highlighting Howmet's mix of commercial and defense aerospace exposure as a key reason it is viewed as a potential core holding. For investors tracking defense and aerospace, Howmet Aerospace sits at the intersection of military demand and commercial...

headline: Howmet's Defense Aerospace Strength Seems Firm: More Upside Ahead?
summary: HWM gains from rising defense budgets as strong F-35 demand and engine spares drive growth, positioning it for continued aerospace momentum.

headline: Geopolitically Themed Investment Risks And Opportunities Take Center Stage
summary: Geopolitics and ever-changing macroeconomic forecasts have driven markets more than underlying fundamentals in the past six weeks. There has also been a lot of sector and industry rotation.
